title: Booking a Doctor Appointment
description: Call a clinic to book a check-up and reschedule a conflict.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Pine Street Clinic, this is Dana speaking. How can I help you?

templates.text: Hi Dana, I'd like to book an appointment for a routine check-up.
templates.hint_zh: 嗨 Dana,我想預約一個例行健康檢查。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course. Are you a returning patient or a new one?

templates.text: I'm a returning patient. My last visit was about a year ago.
templates.hint_zh: 我是舊病人,上次看診大概是一年前。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it. We have an opening next Tuesday at ten in the morning, does that work?

templates.text: Tuesday morning is tough for me. Do you have anything in the afternoon?
templates.hint_zh: 週二早上對我來說有點難,下午還有時段嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Let me check. Tuesday at three thirty is open, or Thursday at four.

templates.text: Thursday at four works great for me.
templates.hint_zh: 週四下午四點可以,完全沒問題。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect. Could you confirm your full name and date of birth, please?

templates.text: Sure, Alex Lee, March twelfth, nineteen ninety-two.
templates.hint_zh: 好的,Alex Lee,1992 年 3 月 12 日。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Thank you. Have any of your insurance details changed since your last visit?

templates.text: Yes, I have a new provider. Can I email a copy of the card before the visit?
templates.hint_zh: 有,我換了保險公司,可以在看診前先 email 保險卡的影本嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, please send it to records at pinestclinic dot com. Anything else?

templates.text: One more thing - should I fast before the appointment?
templates.hint_zh: 再請問一下,看診前需要空腹嗎?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, please don't eat anything for at least eight hours if you'll be having blood drawn.

templates.text: Got it. Thanks for your help, see you Thursday.
templates.hint_zh: 了解,謝謝你的協助,週四見。
